---
title: "Force"
generated: true
description: "Driving force for a dense-field (SVF) registration driver."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register`](../nitrix-register.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.register._force`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:Force -->
```python
class Force(Protocol)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:Force -->
Driving force for a dense-field (SVF) registration driver.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:Force.bind -->
```python
bind(fixed: Float[Array, '*spatial'], *, ndim: int, rel_spacing: RelSpacing = None) -> BoundForce
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Bind to `fixed`, hoisting fixed-dependent state once.


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:Force -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
